query:
UPDATE quotationItems 
SET closetConfig = SUBSTRING(closetConfig, 2, LENGTH(closetConfig) - 2)
WHERE quotationId = '4380001' 
AND itemType = 'closet'
AND closetConfig LIKE '"%"';
